title: Bug-fix sweep — feed, messages & chat polish
notes: Fix: Edit Post now actually shows your post text (was opening empty)
New: Location chips on home actually filter the experts list
New: Audience selector (Public / Followers / Only me) now filters feed reads
New: Pull-to-refresh on home feed AND inbox — drag down to refresh
New: Coin chip shows your real balance (was stuck on 1,240)
New: 'Last seen' in chat header, 🔕 icon in inbox for muted convos
Fix: Block-on-send now actually checks blocked list correctly
Fix: Restrict mode silences notifications, badges & typing from restricted users
Fix: Photo uploads no longer leak memory after sending
Fix: Reactions no longer briefly flash stale data when switching chats
Polish: Copy-link gives real success/failure toast instead of false 'copied' alert
